case.title: HIGGINS v. STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA

opinion.h1: HIGGINS v. STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA, 361 U.S. 538 (1960)
opinion.h4: HIGGINS v. STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF CALIFORNIA. No. 389, Misc. Decided February 23, 1960.
opinion.p: The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
361 U.S. 538 RYAN v. TINSLEY, WARDEN. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE TENTH CIRCUIT. No. 490, Misc. Decided February 23, 1960.
